query:
-- Check services assignment status
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND customerExternalId != '' AND customerExternalId != 'NULL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as assigned,
  SUM(CASE WHEN customerExternalId IS NULL OR customerExternalId = '' OR customerExternalId = 'NULL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unassigned,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Active' AND (customerExternalId IS NULL OR customerExternalId = '' OR customerExternalId = 'NULL') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active_unassigned
FROM services;

  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Active' AND (customerExternalId IS NULL OR customerExternalId = '' OR customerExternalId = 'NULL') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active_unassigned
